title: Retrieval Augmented Generation
text: RAG systems retrieve external evidence before generating an answer, improving factual grounding.

title: Agent Planning
text: Agentic systems decompose goals into steps, call tools, observe results, and revise plans.

title: Evaluation of LLM Systems
text: LLM evaluation should inspect final answers and intermediate traces such as retrieved evidence and tool calls.

title: Multimodal Agents
text: Multimodal agents combine text, images, tools, and structured observations to complete tasks.

title: Human Escalation
text: High uncertainty or unsupported claims should trigger escalation or a request for more evidence.
